title: Filter operator registry SSOT consumption
mechanism: DS-wide:grep 全 packages/design-system/src ts+tsx(含 stories)op 字串 literal('is_empty'/'gte'/'lte'/'on_or_before'/op array/Set)+ OPERATOR_REGISTRY/getValueShape/getOperatorSpec import 對照。逐 consumer 驗:(a) hardcode op array 不 import registry;(b) inline switch derive ValueShape 繞 getValueShape
verdict: 0 after 全掃(op-touching 檔 10 個逐一驗):data-table-filter-panel / filter-group / value-picker / column-types / FieldControlGroup 3 stories 全 import registry SSOT(stories 的 ['is','contains'] 為 registry 篩選非 hardcode);filter-tree.ts 的 case 'gte'/'lte' 與 PERSON_CAPABLE_OPS/TEXT_OPS Set 為 evaluator 語意實作 + prepared-cache 分類(該檔即 registry 同族 SSOT,已 import OPERATOR_REGISTRY,非 ValueShape derivation),二次驗證非違反
